message:
audit: complete 100% coverage — batches 376-377 (48 files, ~7,292L)

Batch 376 (7 files, ~5,495L): plan/fixtures.rs, transport/tests.rs,
trace/mod.rs, cli/mod.rs, net/quic/error.rs, net/sys/windows.rs,
runtime/scheduler/mod.rs — all SOUND.

Batch 377 (41 files, ~1,797L): All remaining mod.rs files, test
drivers, and small utilities — all SOUND. 0 bugs found.

All 561 .rs files in src/ are now audited (571 entries in
audit_index.jsonl, some files audited across multiple batches).
